title: We Move Them
storyPurpose: Aftermath; Lanternmaster admits circus protected Riftborn; crystal protected.

panels.description: Aftermath damaged pavilion; caring for Ironmantle; Mira faces Lanternmaster.

bubbles.speaker: Lanternmaster
bubbles.text: We have moved Riftborn between safe places for generations. Stages make better walls than prisons — sometimes.

panels.description: Vault crystal under ward; Spark calm beside it briefly.

bubbles.speaker: Lanternmaster
bubbles.text: Your sanctuary crystal was never Meridian loot. It was lantern cargo.

bubbles.speaker: Mira Eggwarden
bubbles.text: Protection and imprisonment share a door. Which side are you on when it closes?

grokPrompt: Original high-energy Western fantasy comic storytelling with dynamic panel composition, dramatic inked linework, richly painted colors, expressive character acting, and clear cinematic action. Original Riftwilds IP only. Warm earth greens, sandstone, timber, moss first; deep blue and ember-gold circus fabrics; cyan rift energy and amber lantern accents only. NO purple AI-fantasy default. NO Marvel/DC/Pokémon characters or logos. Riftwilds comic "The Traveling Circus" Issue #3, STORY PAGE 23/25 — We Move Them. Story purpose: Aftermath; Lanternmaster admits circus protected Riftborn; crystal protected. Layout: two-col. 2 panels with clear inked gutters. Panel 1 (p23a): Aftermath damaged pavilion; caring for Ironmantle; Mira faces Lanternmaster. Panel 2 (p23b): Vault crystal under ward; Spark calm beside it briefly. Characters: mira-eggwarden, lanternmaster. Creatures: spark, ironmantle. Mira design lock: Mira Eggwarden: young hatchery mentor/Keeper, practical robes and egg-care satchel, warm determined expression, travel-stained coat, Compact lantern charm. Spark design lock: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail; steadier aura when bonded to Mira; cute but original — not a franchise mascot. Lumenhare: Lumenhare: small indigo hare-like Rift companion, long luminous ears with gold tips, gold star markings, lantern-shaped tail glow, expressive eyes, illusion afterimages when leaping. Lanternmaster: Cael Vesper the Lanternmaster: mid-40s theatrical host, deep blue and ember-gold coat, brass lantern clasps, hand-painted half-mask with lantern motif, charismatic posture. Environment: Lanternveil Traveling Circus. Time: twilight. Weather: soft magical fog. Lighting: ember-gold lanterns with cyan rift accents. Continuity: {"crystal":"confirmed-circus-protection","lanternmaster":{"admittedRiftbornShelter":true}} Leave empty balloon-safe and narration-safe negative space. NO readable text of any kind in the artwork. NO Cal Reed.
negativePrompt: readable dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, page numbers, UI chrome, Marvel, DC, Pokémon, manga screentone trademarks, extra limbs, duplicate characters, missing companions, purple neon fantasy default, photoreal modern clothing, Pikachu lookalike, Cal Reed
letteringInstructions: Standard speech + narration; keep tails off faces and Spark/Lumenhare eyes.
artAlt: We Move Them — The Traveling Circus page 23
transcript: SPEECH (Lanternmaster): We have moved Riftborn between safe places for generations. Stages make better walls than prisons — sometimes.
SPEECH (Lanternmaster): Your sanctuary crystal was never Meridian loot. It was lantern cargo.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Protection and imprisonment share a door. Which side are you on when it closes?
